name: Orchestrator Agent — Independent Eval
description:
Evaluates orchestrator_agent in isolation, without going through the router.

orthestrator_agent handles requests that span both invoice data and support/how-to guidance.
It delegates to invoice_agent_helper and support_agent_helper via AgentTool, with free-text
args (request=...) — so tool_trajectory_avg_score cannot reliably assert exact args.

These cases use rubric_based_final_response_quality_v1 and rubric_based_tool_use_quality_v1
to validate that the orchestrator:
  (a) produces a response that covers both domains in a single answer, and
  (b) correctly invoked both helper sub-agents (invoice and support) to gather information.

All cases are single-domain-plus-how-to requests that should trigger both helpers.

parts.text: Show me invoice 10 and explain how to fix the missing VAT rate
Check invoice 10 and tell me how to approve it
How to upload an invoice and show me invoice 10
